items.value: Hey!
The principal is out for a break!
Which means we have to respect even more the rules!
Oh no!
There's no lights...
No machines...
No nothing!
Everything just got a little more mysterious!
Attention! Attention everyone! The noise lock down is imminent!
We run regular tests in our noise-blocking curtains,
to make sure student can't leave before their hearing senses get good as mine!
BRR!
T-That's really cooold!
But hey, look!
Say hi to the snowmen!
Hey! Look at the past, literally!
My hologram machine is working now!
Everything will get REALLY confusing!
Even my holograms agree!
WOAH!
Our super fans are active!
Let's enjoy the refreshing air for those tough exams!
Today's the skateboard day!
Let's all hop on a skateboard to practice some cool impressive moves!
Everyone! It's time for some cool dance!
The shakiness is just for the motivation!
Hey! This place is too predictable!
Why not shuffle things around!
Everyone, everyone! Looks like the storm is brewing!
Careful where you step or the lighting might struck on you!
Hey! A super mystery room has appeared!
Hey! Take a look at this!
The environment feels much cleaner with our new plants!
But like in nature,
they are still DANGEROUS!
